arts.ttl: Burnley player ratings vs Leeds United as one man catches the eye with 8/10 performance - gallery
arts.sum: Burnley produced a resilient rearguard display to claim a big three points against promotion rivals Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings as Solomon slip punished in tight Burnley loss
arts.sum: Koleosho scored the goal after running the entire length of the pitch after Solomon slipped, taking advantage of Jayden Bogle's indecision and Illan Meslier's shoddy attempt at a save. Caught out, like many, by the Manor Solomon slip which left Leeds out of shape at the back.

arts.ttl: Leeds beaten at Elland Road as Koleosho strikes for Burnley
arts.sum: Luca Koleosho scored a stunning first-half breakaway goal as Burnley destroyed Leeds' unbeaten start to the season in front of Hollywood actor Will Ferrell.

arts.ttl: Leeds United 0-1 Burnley: Luca Koleosho helps resilient Clarets land early blow on promotion rivals
arts.sum: Burnley produced a resilient rearguard display to land an early blow to promotion rivals Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Resolute Burnley stay classy in front of watching Will Ferrell at Elland Road
arts.sum: Leeds were unable to find a way through.

arts.ttl: Will Ferrell breaks silence on Leeds United investment and his love affair with English football
arts.sum: When asked why so many Americans are investing into English clubs, Ferrell replied: "I think we are finally catching up to what a wonderful game this is. On his affinity for football, he said: "I think it comes from playing as a kid.

arts.ttl: Hollywood star Will Ferrell in Elland Road stands as Leeds host Burnley
arts.sum: Ferrell, 57, bought a minority stake in Leeds back in May.

arts.ttl: Minority shareholder Will Ferrell pictured with Leeds United chief Paraag Marathe at Elland Road
arts.sum: It was all smiles in Leeds United's director's box ahead of today's clash with Burnley as Will Ferrell attended his first match since becoming a minority shareholder in the Championship club. Ferrell, who was seen filming the Elland Road South Stand belting out Marching On Together, is understood to have invested in United earlier this year.

arts.ttl: 25 images of Burnley fans arriving at Elland for Championship fixture against Leeds United
arts.sum: Burnley fans have arrived at Elland Road for the Championship fixture against Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Roberts and Foster out: How Burnley line-up for Leeds United test as debut handed out
arts.sum: Burnley are without Connor Roberts and Lyle Foster for this lunchtime’s clash against promotion rivals Leeds United.
